summary: Classified the PR-inventory shard without proposing shared canonical routing. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are planned because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and disables instant/low-signal closeout. Security-sensitive hydrated refs are routed item-by-item; the open PRs with failed proof, maintainer-review labels, active author/waiting states, or unresolved bot findings are scoped needs_human decisions.
